2026-04-25_PlantSetpointFix.summary: Real root cause fix for TES Use branch not delivering cooling. (1) PlantEquipmentOperation:ComponentSetpoint adds equipment_3=ChilledWaterTank so plant solver maintains supply outlet 6.67C via TES Use when chiller is killed. (2) P_7 (HVAC iteration guard, InsideHVACSystemIterationLoop) now resets TES_Use/Source_MFlow_Max/Min and Avail every iteration to prevent plant solver from overwriting EMS setpoints. P_5 Max_Flow=389.0 retained (physically correct, matches 9.77 MW nameplate).
